entries.text:
Verse 2

And ye are puffed up

What contempt this pours upon the divisions among the Corinthians: "Apollonians," and "Paulinians," and "Cephasites," all alike indifferent to this instance of gross sin!

Verse 5

destruction

(Greek - ὄλεθρο, used elsewhere, 1 Thessalonians 5:3; 2 Thessalonians 1:9; 1 Timothy 6:9. never means annihilation.

saved (See Scofield "Romans 1:16").

Jesus Some ancient authorities omit "Jesus."

Verse 10

world

kosmos = mankind. (See Scofield "Matthew 4:8").
